action_name: Activate screening, triage, and visual alerts
action_description: Activate front-end respiratory screening, triage flow, signage, and source-control messaging at entrances, registration, and waiting areas
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; community_activity_level; hospital_respiratory_burden; influenza_specific_hospital_burden; prior_hai_burden
contraindications_or_blockers: severe staffing shortage; no operational intake point
feasibility_notes: Mostly operational rather than bedside; can be scaled by facility area
audit_notes: Log activation date, affected areas, and deactivation date

action_description: Provide mask, initiate respiratory hygiene measures, and route symptomatic person through screening/triage
feasibility_notes: Low-complexity action; should be easy to execute
audit_notes: Log time, actor, and whether mask was accepted

action_name: Separate symptomatic persons in waiting area
action_description: Seat symptomatic persons away from others or route to separate area when possible
feasibility_notes: May require temporary workaround rather than ideal separation
audit_notes: Log separation method and whether dedicated area existed

action_description: Review whether rapid influenza testing or confirmatory testing is indicated
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; community_activity_level; same_room_exposure; same_unit_exposure; hospital_respiratory_burden; ward_cluster_state; ward_vulnerability
contraindications_or_blockers: test unavailable; poor sample feasibility; result unlikely to change management
feasibility_notes: Testing pathway may vary by hospital capability
audit_notes: Log order time, test type, and result linkage

action_description: Review and implement droplet precautions for suspected or confirmed influenza
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; community_activity_level; immunocompromise_status; ward_vulnerability; outbreak_state; prolonged_shedding_risk
contraindications_or_blockers: no feasible PPE supply; severe patient non-adherence; unclear diagnosis
audit_notes: Log start time, stop time, and reviewer

action_description: Review whether patient should be placed in a single room, cohorted, or managed through another IPC-approved placement option
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; influenza_specific_hospital_burden; ward_vulnerability; same_room_exposure; same_unit_exposure; outbreak_state; capacity_stress
contraindications_or_blockers: no single room available; no suitable cohort partner; roommate extremely vulnerable
feasibility_notes: Requires bed-management input and documented rationale
audit_notes: Log rooming decision, alternatives considered, and constraint reason

action_description: Review contingency strategy when single-room placement is not feasible, including barriers, roommate selection, masking, and related safeguards
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; influenza_specific_hospital_burden; ward_vulnerability; outbreak_state; same_room_exposure_history; prophylaxis_policy; capacity_stress
contraindications_or_blockers: incompatible roommate; no barrier capability; extreme vulnerability; unsafe room layout
feasibility_notes: Use only under explicit capacity constraints
audit_notes: Log why ideal placement failed and which safeguards were selected

action_description: Review whether antiviral treatment is indicated and feasible
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; community_activity_level; patient_vulnerability; severity_context; outbreak_context
contraindications_or_blockers: contraindication; drug interaction; unavailable drug; clinically inappropriate timing
feasibility_notes: Clinical action only after human review
audit_notes: Log indication, chosen drug, timing, and reason if not started

action_description: Review whether antiviral prophylaxis is indicated after documented influenza exposure
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; community_activity_level; same_room_exposure; ward_vulnerability; ward_saturation_state; hcw_vaccination_coverage; influenza_specific_hospital_burden
contraindications_or_blockers: contraindication; delayed recognition beyond useful window; unavailable drug
audit_notes: Log exposure basis, review time, and final decision

action_description: Review whether symptomatic or influenza-positive staff should be removed from work or reassigned
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; community_activity_level; high_vulnerability_ward_assignment; multi_ward_cross_coverage; ward_cluster_state; hcw_vaccination_coverage
contraindications_or_blockers: severe staffing emergency; unclear symptom status
feasibility_notes: Key reviewable action for staff-vector control
audit_notes: Log restriction decision, duration, and override reason

action_description: Review whether exposed or recently ill staff should avoid high-vulnerability wards
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; community_activity_level; ward_vulnerability; clean_vs_saturated_ward_state; service_line_priority; staffing_pressure
contraindications_or_blockers: severe staffing shortage; no replacement; low-confidence exposure
feasibility_notes: Particularly useful in multi-ward staffing models
audit_notes: Log affected wards and reassignment decision

action_description: Review whether universal or expanded masking should be activated for staff in an affected ward
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; community_activity_level; influenza_specific_hospital_burden; ward_vulnerability; hcw_vaccination_coverage; cluster_signal; staff_movement_between_units
audit_notes: Log threshold crossed and activation/deactivation times

action_description: Review visitation limits, visitor masking, education, and exceptions
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; community_activity_level; unit_vulnerability; outbreak_state; visitor_symptom_status
contraindications_or_blockers: legal or humanitarian exception; poor compliance
audit_notes: Log restriction level and exception rationale

action_description: Review masking, routing, destination handoff, and receiving-unit notification before movement
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; community_activity_level; destination_vulnerability; outbreak_state; transport_distance
feasibility_notes: Common leakage point in transmission chains
audit_notes: Log transport precautions and receiving-team notification

action_description: Review enhanced precautions for aerosol-generating procedures on suspected or confirmed influenza cases
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; community_activity_level; immunocompromise_status; outbreak_state; viral_burden_concern
contraindications_or_blockers: emergent situation; no AIIR; incomplete PPE
feasibility_notes: Should support procedural safety without auto-canceling urgent care
audit_notes: Log PPE level, room, and personnel present

action_description: Review whether a ward-level or hospital-level outbreak response should be activated
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; community_activity_level; hospital_respiratory_burden; influenza_specific_hospital_burden; ward_vulnerability; clean_vs_saturated_state; subtype_signal; importation_pressure; capacity_stress
audit_notes: Log outbreak review start, decision, scope, and closure

action_description: Review whether extended precautions, repeat testing, or antiviral reassessment are needed for prolonged course or shedding
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; immunocompromise_status; critical_illness; room_sharing; ward_vulnerability
contraindications_or_blockers: no repeat data; unclear ongoing infectivity
feasibility_notes: Useful for complex or immunocompromised cases
audit_notes: Log reason for extension and reassessment outcome

action_name: Annual vaccination program and coverage tracking
action_description: Promote annual influenza vaccination, improve access, and track coverage in staff and target patient groups
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; vaccination_campaign_start; vaccination_campaign_end; community_activity_level; prior_hai_burden; hcw_vaccination_gap; service_line_vulnerability
contraindications_or_blockers: no vaccine supply; incomplete coverage data
feasibility_notes: Programmatic action rather than bedside intervention
audit_notes: Log campaign dates, coverage values, and subgroup gaps

action_description: Support leadership accountability, staff training, patient/family education, surveillance, adherence monitoring, and feedback loops
contextual_inputs: seasonality_profile_id; current_date; community_activity_level; hospital_respiratory_burden; prior_hai_burden; service_line_vulnerability
feasibility_notes: Governance action rather than bedside action
audit_notes: Log plan owner, monitoring cadence, and review dates
